description: substring-search PrimeKG nodes by name, optionally filtered by node type (read-only)
rules: read-only — never mutates the graph or any remote service
matches NAME_QUERY case-insensitively against node names across the union of x_* and y_* node columns
NODE_TYPE narrows results to one type (e.g. disease | drug | gene/protein)
returns at most the first 20 matches (the core's head(20))
writes the matches as JSON to record_store
usage: Set PRIMEKG_CSV (path to kg.csv) and NAME_QUERY; optionally NODE_TYPE. Output: search_nodes.json.
limitation: Substring match only (no fuzzy/synonym search); capped at 20 results. Requires pandas and a local PrimeKG kg.csv edge list.
